effects.text: EACH TIME NARUTO USES 'OODAMA RASENGAN' OR 'KYUUBI EMPOWERED RASENGAN', HE WILL GAIN 1 KYUUBI RAGE STACK.
THIS CHARACTER WILL TAKE 5 PIERCING DAMAGE.

castableNow.name: Shadow Clones: Rasengan
castableNow.description: The following turn, Naruto will deal 20 piercing damage to one enemy. During this time, Naruto will ignore all harmful effects. During 'Passive: Three Tails Release', this skill will be replaced. This skill is invisible.

castableNow.name: Kyuubi Boost
castableNow.description: Naruto loses 10 health and for 3 turns gains 10 points of damage reduction. The following 3 turns, he will ignore stun effects and this skill becomes 'Kyuubi Empowered Rasengan'. Cannot be used during 'Passive: Three Tails Transformation'.

castableNow.name: Shadow Clone Save
castableNow.description: This skill makes Uzumaki Naruto (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.

notAffordableNow.name: Oodama Rasengan
notAffordableNow.description: Naruto uses a greater version of Rasengan, dealing 40 piercing damage to one enemy ignoring invulnerability. During 'Kyuubi Boost', this skill will stun that enemy's non-mental skills for 1 turn. Afterwards, Naruto takes 5 affliction damage*. During 'Passive: Three Tails Release', this skill will be replaced.

castableNow.name: Detachment of Primitive World
castableNow.description: Ohnoki isolates an enemy with his dust release, dealing 10 affliction damage to them. For 1 turn, that enemy will be invulnerable to helpful skills and their harmful skills will be stunned. The following turn, this skill will be replaced by 'Dust Implode'.

castableNow.name: Super-Weighted Boulder Technique
castableNow.description: Onhoki touches an enemy and makes them much heavier. For 2 turns, the cost of their harmful skills will be increased by 1 random. This skill ends if that enemy uses a new harmful skill.

castableNow.name: Rock Fist
castableNow.description: Increasing his striking power with Rock Fist, Ohnoki deals 30 damage to one enemy. Afterwards, Ohnoki gains 15 permanent destructible defense.

castableNow.name: Effortless Flight
castableNow.description: This skill makes Tsuchikage (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.

effects.text: THIS CHARACTER WILL TAKE 5 PIERCING DAMAGE.

castableNow.name: Explosive Water Shock Wave
castableNow.description: Kisame Body Double (S) fills the battlefield with water. For 3 turns, all allies including Kisame will lose one less chakra if a chakra removal or stealing skill is used on them. For 3 turns, all enemies who use a skill will have the cooldown of that skill increased by 1 turn.*

castableNow.name: Water Prison Technique
castableNow.description: Using a bubble of water, Kisame stuns the physical or ranged skills of one enemy for 1 turn. During this time the enemy takes 15 affliction damage* and becomes invulnerable to friendly skills, and Kisame gains 15 points of damage reduction. During Explosive Water Shock Wave this skill costs 1 random chakra.

castableNow.name: Kisame Body Double (S) Water Clone
castableNow.description: This skill makes Kisame Body Double (S) <Defense>invulnerable<Defense> for 1 turn.

notAffordableNow.name: Five Man-Eating Sharks
notAffordableNow.description: Kisame Body Double summons five sharks of water who attack one enemy dealing 25 damage for 2 turns. During Explosive Water Shock Wave this skill costs 1 ninjutsu chakra.

all.name: Explosive Water Shock Wave

effects.text: THIS SKILL WILL BE REPLACED BY 'ONE'S OWN LIFE REINCARNATION'.
IF AN ENEMY USES A NEW HARMFUL NON-MENTAL DAMAGING SKILL BEE, THEY WILL TAKE 10 PIERCING DAMAGE.
EACH TURN, THAT ALLY WILL NULLIFY THE FIRST HARMFUL PHYSICAL OR CHAKRA NON-AFFLICTION SKILL USED ON THEM.
THIS CHARACTER'S MELEE SKILLS ARE IMPROVED AND WILL DEAL 25% MORE DAMAGE.
HUNGRY SHARKS ARE HUNTING THEIR PREY.
